name: com.kobapps.uiimageeffectskit
description: Surface-correct, resolution-independent outline / shadow / glow / blur for uGUI Images using cached Signed Distance Fields. A drop-in component that extends UnityEngine.UI.Image with a reorderable effect stack, crisp scaling at any zoom, full Mask / RectMask2D support, atlas support, and one-click SDF embedding (GPU or CPU bake, all platforms).

samples.description: Builds a scene of stacked-effect examples (plain, outline, double outline, drop shadow, glow, multi-glow neon, combined, crisp face) using the bundled demo sprites. Run via Tools ▸ UI Image Effects Kit ▸ Build Effect Showcase.
